column1: # Raman scan size: 23/24 points; Fluor scan size: 0/0 points
column2: raman shift determined using excitation wavelength of 248.56 nm
column3: average intensity = average of all spectra in scan after laser correction (adjusting value of each individual spectrum to account for variations in laser energy output) + automatic cosmic ray removal + automatic outlier detection + recombination of separate R+F CCD regions
column5: Normalised intensity: average spectrum normalised by dividing by the maximum intensity between 255 and 355 nm
column7: Baselined intensity: average spectrum after subtraction of polynomial baseline fitted to predefined points between 0 and 4000 cm-1
column9: Baselined normalised intensity: baselined spectrum normalised by dividing by the maximum intensity between 400 and 4000 cm-1 (ignoring 650-720 cm-1 region obscured by NeCu emission line)
column10: standard deviation for baselined normalised spectrum
